text:
- Update to 20071210
- Add WITHOUT_PYTHON knob
- Mark as BROKEN when Python is enabled on non-i386 arch
- Don't define port-extract if NOPORTDOCS is defined
- Slight cleanup in Makefile
- Fixed pkg-plist for some of the new knobs
